raw_transcript: We treat it by dampening the immune system, usually starting with Prednisone and then transitioning to a drug called Azathioprine. It's very effective, but we have to monitor your labs weekly at first.
final_corrected_note: We treat it by dampening the immune system, usually starting with Prednisone and then transitioning to a drug called Azathioprine. It's very effective, but we have to monitor your labs weekly at first.
